kcs.title: Knights Council Supreme
kcs.overview: The Knights Council Supreme is a major organization specializing in mechanized warfare and logistics.

sections.History: The KCS developed alongside the expansion of human civilization and became a major military organization.
sections.Doctrine: The KCS focuses on mechanized combat, logistics, and specialized battlefield operations.

sow.title: Special Operator Weapons
sow.overview: Special Weapon Operator weapons are advanced weapons requiring specialized certification.

sections.Examples: Known examples include the HMMR and HSR-93.
sections.Purpose: Designed for operators requiring capabilities beyond standard equipment.

hmcm.title: Heavy Military Combat Machine
hmcm.overview: HMCMs are advanced combat machines used for mechanized warfare.

sections.Generations: HMCM technology has progressed through multiple generations.
sections.Pilots: Later generations introduced advanced AI integration.
